message:
Ignore local .env files in frankenfs

Add `.env` to the frankenfs .gitignore so dotenv-style secret overlays
(filesystem mount credentials, S3/R2 keys, test-only passphrases) do
not accidentally land in git alongside the existing root-level
`/*.txt`, `/*.json` and `!package.json` scratch-file rules.

Pattern details:

- Matches any `.env` at any depth — anchors aren't used — which is
  what dotenv, direnv, vite and next expect.
- Does not affect `.env.example` / `.env.sample` (different filenames)
  so documentation dotfiles remain committable.
- Placed at the bottom of the file, outside the anchored section, so
  the existing anchored rules continue to behave as before.

This mirrors the same one-line `.env` addition already applied to
other franken_* sibling repos and keeps the ignore policy consistent
across the family.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
